sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49071" key="qrausth/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θραυσ-τήριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n49071.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">capable of dissolving</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λίθων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg002:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.19</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
